rpeMismatch.label: RPE Deviation
rpeMismatch.help: Alert if the difference between planned and actual RPE exceeds this value.

lowCompliance.label: Minimum Compliance (%)
lowCompliance.help: Alert if overall compliance falls below this percentage.

matchingThreshold.label: Matching Tolerance (%)
matchingThreshold.help: Adjust the margin used by the engine to match laps to the plan.

loadRiskCard.title: Load Risk
loadRiskCard.intro: ACWR and TSB are calculated from each athlete's activity history. Hover over each icon to see what it means and when it triggers an alert.

highAcwr.label: High ACWR
highAcwr.explanation: ACWR (Acute:Chronic Workload Ratio) compares the load from the last 7 days with the average over the past 4–6 weeks. If an athlete's ACWR exceeds this number, a High Risk alert is triggered: they are training well above what their body has been tolerating, which increases injury risk. Typical reference: 1.5.

moderateAcwr.label: Moderate ACWR
moderateAcwr.explanation: Same calculation as High ACWR, but with a lower threshold. If the ACWR exceeds this number (without reaching the High threshold), it is marked as Moderate Risk: an early signal that load has ramped up quickly. Typical reference: 1.3.

lowStimulusAcwr.label: Low ACWR
lowStimulusAcwr.explanation: If the ACWR falls below this number, it is marked as Low Stimulus: the athlete is training well below their usual load (risk of fitness loss, not injury). Typical reference: 0.8.

highTsb.label: High TSB
highTsb.explanation: TSB (Training Stress Balance / 'Form') is the difference between accumulated fitness (CTL) and the athlete's recent fatigue (ATL). It is a negative number when there is fatigue. If TSB drops below this value (e.g., -30), a High Risk alert is triggered due to excessive accumulated fatigue.

moderateTsb.label: Moderate TSB
moderateTsb.explanation: Same concept as High TSB, with a less strict threshold. If TSB drops below this value (e.g., -15) without reaching the High threshold, it is marked as Moderate Risk.

lowStimulusTsb.label: Low TSB
lowStimulusTsb.explanation: If TSB rises above this value (e.g., +25), it is marked as Low Stimulus: the athlete is very rested and/or has low recent load, which may indicate they are not training enough to keep progressing.

autoLink.label: Auto-link
autoLink.help: If enabled, the engine links Strava activities to the plan automatically. If disabled, each match is held for manual review before being confirmed.

priorityFirst.label: Priority alert
priorityFirst.help: This alert card always appears first on the athlete dashboard.

defaultRpe.label: Default expected RPE
defaultRpe.help: Suggested initial RPE when creating a new workout with no defined effort.

autoMatch.label: Auto matching
autoMatch.help: If enabled, Strava activities are linked to the plan without confirmation. Otherwise, they are held for review.

duplicateHandling.label: Duplicate activities
duplicateHandling.help: What to do when an activity has already been imported.

detail.loadMonitoringSubtitle: Internal load status and fatigue risk
detail.loadRiskHint: Quick reference: TSB {tsb}, ATL {atl}, CTL {ctl}, ACWR {acwr}. A very negative TSB usually indicates fatigue accumulation; ACWR > 1.3 may indicate a sharp load increase.

metricTooltip.ctl: CTL (Chronic Training Load): long-term load average. Represents accumulated fitness.
metricTooltip.atl: ATL (Acute Training Load): recent load average. Represents short-term fatigue.
metricTooltip.tsb: TSB (Training Stress Balance): difference between CTL and ATL. Negative values usually indicate higher fatigue.
metricTooltip.acwr: ACWR (Acute:Chronic Workload Ratio): ratio between recent load and chronic baseline. Sharp changes raise the risk.
metricTooltip.todayLoad: Today's load: accumulated stress for the current day.
metricTooltip.last7DaysAvg: Average load over the last 7 days to provide context for the recent trend.

hero.subtitle: The all-in-one platform for endurance coaches and athletes. Now also ready to integrate with AI via MCP, automate summaries, and turn data into actions. All in one place. No excuses. Just data.

features.desc1: Connect Endurix with assistants and automations to query metrics, summarize weeks, and trigger actions without leaving your workflow.
features.desc2: Build micro and macro cycles with a logical interface designed for high-volume prescriptions.
features.desc3: Instant feedback loops. Athletes execute, coaches analyze. No friction in the communication layer.

howItWorks.subtitle: From connecting the watch to the coaching decision, in a single flow.
howItWorks.step1Desc: Invite them by link or email. They confirm and land in your dashboard instantly.
howItWorks.step2Desc: Activities come in on their own via webhook, synced to the second.
howItWorks.step3Desc: Build it with AI, by hand, or reuse a template. Edit days and sets whenever you want.
howItWorks.step4Desc: Alerts, compliance and load in one place. The plan adjusts with the data.
howItWorks.mockLoadAlert: High load this week · review 2 athletes

bento.subtitle: Stop jumping between spreadsheets, WhatsApp and scattered apps. Endurix brings your operation together and automates the repetitive.
bento.metricsDesc: Load, form and adherence for every athlete, in real time and on a single dashboard.
bento.planningDesc: Build reusable mesocycles, assign whole weeks and copy or paste them between athletes.
bento.syncDesc: Activities to the second via webhook, with no reloads or exports.
bento.assistantTitle: Hours of work, now in seconds
bento.assistantDesc: Ask it in plain text to summarize weeks or build a plan, and you are done.
bento.alertsDesc: Catch load spikes or drop-off before they affect the plan.
bento.appDesc: They see the day, log the session, and everything stays in sync.
bento.racesDesc: Goals, tapering and reminders to peak on race day.

aiAssistant.subtitle: An AI assistant that does what you would do in the platform, just by asking in plain text. Connected via MCP, so you can take it to your favorite AI tools too.
aiAssistant.promptExample: Build Martina a 4-week base block, 5 days a week
aiAssistant.convReply: Done. I built a 4-week base block for Martina:

coachOps.subtitle: Endurix doesn't just record data: it helps you decide what to do with it and, now, connects everything via MCP to act sooner, communicate better, and sustain performance.
coachOps.card1Desc: Summarize weeks, detect patterns, and suggest next steps for athletes and groups from a workflow built for agents and automations.
coachOps.card2Desc: Adherence, load, and activity tracking to detect deviations before they affect the plan.
coachOps.card3Desc: Prioritize upcoming races and trigger athlete notifications when course corrections are needed.
coachOps.card4Desc: Build a multi-week plan once and assign it whole: reusable mesocycles, full weeks and copy/paste between athletes.

roadmap.item1Desc: FTP integration, power zones, and cycling-specific metrics for planning multi-sport workouts.
roadmap.item2Desc: Automatic generation of insights and key signals so the coach can act faster.
roadmap.item3Desc: Send structured workouts directly to your athletes' watches via Garmin Connect API.

faq.a1: Endurix is an all-in-one platform for endurance coaches and athletes: plan workouts, monitor load, sync Strava and Garmin, and turn data into decisions.
faq.q2: Which devices does it integrate with?
faq.a2: It integrates with Strava and Garmin. Activities come in automatically via webhook, synced to the second, with no reloads or manual exports.
faq.a3: Endurix is ready to connect with AI assistants via MCP (Model Context Protocol). You can ask it in plain text to summarize weeks, detect at-risk athletes or prepare a plan, without leaving your flow.
faq.q4: Does it work if I train solo, without a coach?
faq.a4: Yes. You can use Endurix to plan and follow your own training, with the same load metrics and analysis coaches use.
faq.a5: We are in early access. Those who join the list now get the launch price with a founder discount. Join the list to secure your spot.
faq.a6: Join the early-access list with your email. We will reach out with next steps and the team 1:1 onboarding.
faq.a7: Yes. Each team sees only its own data, with database-level isolation. We do not share your information or your athletes.

cta.manifesto: We reject the soft aesthetic of modern lifestyle apps. Endurix is built as a professional-grade tool, ready to integrate with AI and MCP workflows for those who understand that performance is derived from structured, relentless effort.

wishlist.subtitle: Secure your spot before the public launch. We're opening Endurix to coaches who want to take the leap with data, without waiting for the general release.

form.success: DONE! WE'VE GOT YOU ON THE LIST.
form.successDetail: We'll contact you by email in the coming weeks with the next steps.
form.errorDuplicate: This email is already registered. We'll notify you soon.
form.errorGeneric: Something went wrong. Please try again in a few minutes.

benefits.pricing: Locked launch pricing with founder discount.
benefits.community: Access to the private pioneer coaches channel.

wishlist.trust: No spam. No credit card. Cancel from the list anytime.

footer.copyright: © 2026 ENDURIX PERFORMANCE SYSTEMS. NO EXCUSES. JUST DATA.
footer.tagline: The all-in-one platform for endurance coaches and athletes, with a built-in AI assistant.

introduction.title: Introduction
introduction.p1: Welcome to Endurix (we, our, or the platform). We are committed to protecting your personal information and your right to privacy. This policy explains how we collect, use, disclose, and protect your information when you use our platform.
introduction.p2: By using Endurix, you agree to the collection and use of information in accordance with this policy. If you do not agree with these practices, please do not use the service.

personal.title: Personal Information
personal.subtitle: We collect personal information that you voluntarily provide when you:

items.account: Register for an account (name, email, and password)
items.profile: Create your athlete or coach profile (height, weight, heart rate zones, preferences)

activity.title: Activity Data
activity.subtitle: When you connect third-party fitness services, we collect:

items.workout: Workout and activity data (distance, duration, pace, heart rate, elevation)
items.gps: GPS location data from recorded activities
items.device: Information from connected devices and wearables

usage.title: Usage Information
usage.subtitle: We automatically collect certain information when you use the platform:

items.logData: Log data (IP address, browser, operating system, pages visited)

usage.title: How We Use Your Information
usage.subtitle: We use the collected information to:

services.label: Service delivery
services.text: Create and manage your account, facilitate coach-athlete relationships, and deliver training plans

personalization.label: Personalization
personalization.text: Tailor your experience and provide relevant training recommendations

analytics.label: Analytics
analytics.text: Analyze your training data and provide progress and performance insights

communication.label: Communication
communication.text: Send you important updates, notifications, and messages from your coach

improvement.label: Improvement
improvement.text: Understand how the platform is used to improve features

security.label: Security
security.text: Protect against unauthorized access and keep your information secure

compliance.label: Legal compliance
compliance.text: Comply with applicable laws and regulations

integrations.title: Third-Party Integrations
integrations.p1: Endurix integrates with third-party platforms such as Strava, Garmin, and others. When you connect these services:

items.auth: You authorize us to access your activity data on those platforms
items.policies: Their own privacy policies and terms of service apply
items.disconnect: You can disconnect these services at any time from your account

integrations.p2: We recommend reviewing the privacy policies of the third-party services you connect to understand how they manage your data.

strava.title: Strava-Specific Disclosures
strava.intro: If you connect Strava, the following specific terms also apply:

items.consent: We only access your Strava data when you give us explicit authorization, and you can revoke it at any time from Strava or from your account.
items.scope: We inform you which data is requested (e.g., profile, activities, and heart rate zones) and how it is used within Endurix.
items.withdrawal: If you revoke Strava access, we stop syncing and delete the Strava-derived data we hold in our systems.
items.deletion: You can request deletion of Strava-linked data by emailing privacy@endurix.app.
items.usageData: Strava may collect usage information related to access to its API from our integration, in accordance with its API Agreement and privacy policy.
items.attribution: Where applicable, we display the "Powered by Strava" attribution and any additional attribution required by data providers such as Garmin.

garmin.title: Garmin-Specific Disclosures
garmin.intro: If you connect Garmin Connect, the following specific conditions also apply:

items.consent: We only access your Garmin data when you give explicit authorization through the Garmin Connect connection flow.
items.scope: The data we sync includes activities, performance metrics, heart rate, and compatible device data.
items.withdrawal: You can disconnect Garmin at any time from your profile in Endurix or from third-party app settings in Garmin Connect.
items.deletion: When you disconnect Garmin, we stop syncing new data. You can request deletion of historical Garmin-linked data by emailing privacy@endurix.app.
items.priority: If the same workout is recorded on both Strava and Garmin, Endurix prioritizes Garmin data to avoid duplicates.
items.attribution: We display the appropriate Garmin attribution when displaying data from their devices and services.

sharing.title: How We Share Your Information
sharing.subtitle: We may share your information in the following cases:

coach.title: With your coach
coach.text: When you join a coach or group, your coach will have access to your profile, training data, and activity history to provide coaching.

providers.title: Service providers
providers.text: We may share data with trusted providers who help us operate the platform (hosting, analytics, communications). These providers are contractually obligated to protect your information.

legal.title: Legal requirements
legal.text: We may disclose your information if required by law, by court order or government request, or to protect our rights, property, or safety.

sharing.noSell: We do not sell your personal information to third parties.

security.title: Data Security
security.p1: We implement appropriate technical and organizational measures to protect your personal information against unauthorized access, alteration, disclosure, or destruction. These measures include:

items.encryption: Encryption of data in transit and at rest

security.p2: However, no method of internet transmission or electronic storage is 100% secure. While we work to protect your information, we cannot guarantee absolute security.

rights.title: Your Privacy Rights
rights.subtitle: Depending on your location, you may have the following rights:

access.label: Access
access.text: Request access to the personal information we hold about you

correction.label: Correction
correction.text: Request correction of inaccurate or incomplete data

deletion.label: Deletion
deletion.text: Request deletion of your personal information

portability.label: Portability
portability.text: Request a copy of your data in a structured, machine-readable format

withdraw.label: Withdraw consent
withdraw.text: Withdraw consent for data processing where applicable

rights.contact: To exercise these rights, contact us at privacy@endurix.app. We will respond within 30 days.

retention.title: Data Retention
retention.text: We retain your personal information as long as necessary to provide services and fulfill the purposes of this policy. If you delete your account, we will delete or anonymize your information within 90 days, unless we are legally or regulatorily required to retain it.
retention.strava: For data obtained from Strava, additional rules apply: the technical stream cache has a maximum retention of 7 days, and when you revoke authorization or request deletion, we delete the associated Strava data in our systems as soon as technically feasible.

children.title: Children's Privacy
children.text: Our service is not directed to children under 13 years of age. We do not knowingly collect personal information from children under 13. If you believe we have collected data from a child, please contact us immediately and we will take steps to delete it.

transfers.title: International Data Transfers
transfers.text: Your information may be transferred to and processed in countries other than your country of residence. These countries may have different data protection laws. By using our service, you consent to these transfers. We implement appropriate safeguards to protect your data.

changes.title: Changes to This Policy
changes.text: We may update this policy periodically. We will notify you of material changes by posting the new version on this page and updating the last updated date. We encourage you to review it periodically.

contact.title: Contact Us
contact.subtitle: If you have questions or concerns about this policy or our privacy practices, contact us:

ai.title: Artificial Intelligence and Automated Processing
ai.p1: Endurix uses artificial intelligence (AI) technologies to enhance the training experience. Below we describe how they are used and what data is involved:

analysis.title: Training Analysis
analysis.text: We use AI models to analyze data from your activities and workouts, generating performance metrics, pattern detection, and personalized suggestions. This analysis is based exclusively on data you have already provided to the platform.

mcp.title: Programmatic Access (MCP Server)
mcp.text: Endurix exposes an MCP (Model Context Protocol) server that allows coaches to interact with their athletes' data through AI tools. This access:

items.scope: Is limited to data the coach is already authorized to view based on their role and team.
items.noExpansion: Does not expand or modify existing permissions; it respects the same access rules (RLS) as the web interface.
items.noStorage: Does not store conversations or AI responses outside the coach's active session.
items.noThirdParty: Data exposed through MCP is not shared with third parties or used to train AI models.

decisions.title: Automated Decision-Making
decisions.text: We do not use AI to make automated decisions that significantly affect your rights. Training recommendations generated by AI are advisory and are always subject to review and judgment by the coach or athlete.

providers.title: AI Providers
providers.text: We use third-party AI services (such as Anthropic) to process queries within the platform. Data sent to these providers is limited to the context needed for the specific query and is subject to their respective privacy policies and data processing agreements. We do not allow these providers to use your data to train their models.

optOut.title: User Control
optOut.text: You can opt out of AI-based features without affecting your access to the platform's core functionality. If you would like your data not to be processed by AI tools, contact us at privacy@endurix.app.

acceptance.title: Acceptance of Terms
acceptance.p1: By accessing or using Endurix ("the Platform", "the Service"), operated by Endurix Performance Systems ("we", "our"), you agree to be bound by these Terms and Conditions. If you do not agree, do not use the Service.
acceptance.p2: These terms constitute a legally binding agreement between you and Endurix. By creating an account, accessing the platform, or using any feature, you confirm that you have read, understood, and agree to comply with these terms.

description.title: Service Description
description.p1: Endurix is a sports coaching platform focused on running that enables coaches to manage athletes, assign training plans, analyze performance data, and communicate with their athletes.

items.plans: Creation and assignment of personalized training plans
items.sync: Syncing sports activities from third-party devices and platforms (Strava, Garmin)
items.analytics: Performance analysis, metrics, and athlete progress tracking
items.ai: Artificial intelligence tools for training analysis and recommendations
items.mcp: Programmatic access to coaching data through the MCP (Model Context Protocol) protocol

registration.title: Registration
registration.text: To use Endurix you need to create an account providing accurate and complete information. You are responsible for maintaining the confidentiality of your credentials and for all activities that occur under your account.

roles.title: User Roles
roles.text: Endurix operates with three main roles:

items.coach: Coach: Can create teams, invite athletes, assign workouts, view athlete performance data, and use AI tools for analysis.
items.athlete: Athlete: Can connect devices, sync activities, view their training plans and personal metrics.
items.admin: Administrator: Has full access to platform management, including user management and system configuration.

accuracy.title: Data Accuracy
accuracy.text: You agree to provide truthful and up-to-date information. We reserve the right to suspend or delete accounts that contain false or misleading information.

integrations.title: Third-Party Integrations
integrations.p1: Endurix integrates with third-party platforms to enrich the training experience. By connecting these services, you agree to the following conditions:

items.auth: Connecting with Strava requires your explicit authorization through Strava's OAuth flow.
items.data: We access your activity data, profile, and heart rate zones according to the permissions you grant.
items.usage: Strava data is used exclusively for coaching features within Endurix.
items.revoke: You can revoke access at any time from your Endurix account or from Strava's settings.
items.compliance: Our integration complies with the Strava API Agreement terms and we display the "Powered by Strava" attribution where applicable.
items.noSell: We do not sell, license, or share your Strava data with unauthorized third parties.

items.auth: Connecting with Garmin Connect requires your authorization through the Garmin linking process.
items.data: We sync activities, performance metrics, and data from compatible Garmin devices.
items.priority: In case of duplicate activities between Strava and Garmin, Garmin data is prioritized to ensure accuracy.
items.revoke: You can disconnect Garmin at any time from your profile in Endurix.
items.compliance: Our integration complies with the Garmin Connect API terms and we display the appropriate attribution.

integrations.disclaimer: Endurix is not responsible for the availability, accuracy, or operation of third-party services. Changes to APIs or policies of Strava, Garmin, or other providers may affect integration functionality.

ai.title: Artificial Intelligence and Automated Processing
ai.p1: Endurix incorporates artificial intelligence (AI) features subject to the following conditions:

items.analysis: AI is used to analyze training data, generate metrics, and provide personalized recommendations.
items.advisory: AI-generated suggestions and analyses are advisory and do not replace the professional judgment of the coach or medical advice.
items.accuracy: We do not guarantee the accuracy, completeness, or suitability of AI-generated results.
items.review: It is the responsibility of the coach and/or athlete to evaluate and validate recommendations before applying them.

mcp.title: MCP Server (Programmatic Access)
mcp.text: Endurix offers an MCP (Model Context Protocol) server that allows coaches to interact with their athletes' data through AI tools compatible with the protocol.

items.access: Access through MCP is restricted to the same permission level the coach has in the web interface.
items.responsibility: The coach is responsible for their use of data obtained through MCP, including AI-generated responses.
items.noExpansion: MCP does not grant additional access to data the coach cannot normally see on the platform.
items.logging: Interactions through MCP may be logged for security and auditing purposes.

providers.title: AI Providers
providers.text: We use third-party AI providers (such as Anthropic) to process certain features. Data sent to these providers is subject to data processing agreements and is not used to train third-party AI models.

acceptableUse.title: Acceptable Use
acceptableUse.p1: By using Endurix, you agree to:

items.lawful: Use the platform lawfully and in accordance with these terms.
items.accurate: Provide accurate information and keep your account up to date.
items.respectPrivacy: Respect the privacy and data of other users.
items.coachEthics: If you are a coach, act with professional responsibility in handling your athletes' data.

items.unauthorized: Access or attempt to access other users' accounts or data without authorization.
items.scraping: Perform scraping, reverse engineering, or mass data extraction from the platform.
items.interference: Interfere with the operation of the platform or its security systems.
items.misrepresent: Impersonate another user or provide false information.
items.resell: Resell, sublicense, or commercialize access to the platform or its data without authorization.
items.abuseMcp: Use the MCP Server to access data outside the scope of your permissions or for purposes other than coaching.
items.abuseAi: Use AI tools to generate harmful, misleading content or content that violates third-party rights.

platform.title: Our Property
platform.text: Endurix, including its source code, design, logos, trademarks, and original content, is the property of Endurix Performance Systems. All rights reserved. No license to our intellectual property is granted except the limited right to use the platform under these terms.

userData.title: Your Content
userData.text: You retain ownership of the data you upload or generate on the platform. By using the service, you grant us a limited, non-exclusive, and revocable license to process your data for the purpose of providing the service. This license ends when you delete your account or the corresponding data.

thirdParty.title: Third-Party Content
thirdParty.text: Data from integrations such as Strava and Garmin remains subject to the terms of their respective owners. We do not claim ownership of data synced from third-party services.

privacy.title: Privacy and Data Protection
privacy.text: The processing of your personal data is governed by our Privacy Policy, available at /privacy. By using Endurix, you accept the practices described in that policy.
privacy.coachResponsibility: If you are a coach, you are co-responsible for the processing of your athletes' data within the platform. You must inform your athletes about how their data is used and obtain the necessary consents under applicable law.

warranties.title: Disclaimer of Warranties
warranties.p1: Endurix is provided "as is" and "as available." To the fullest extent permitted by law, we disclaim all warranties, express or implied, including but not limited to:

items.fitness: Warranties of fitness for a particular purpose.
items.accuracy: Warranties of accuracy, reliability, or completeness of data and analysis.
items.availability: Warranties of uninterrupted or error-free availability.
items.aiAccuracy: Warranties regarding the accuracy of AI-generated recommendations.
items.integrations: Warranties regarding the continued operation of integrations with Strava, Garmin, or other services.

liability.title: Limitation of Liability
liability.p1: To the fullest extent permitted by applicable law, Endurix shall not be liable for:

items.indirect: Indirect, incidental, special, consequential, or punitive damages.
items.lostData: Loss of data, profits, or business opportunities.
items.thirdParty: Acts or omissions of third-party services (Strava, Garmin, AI providers).
items.health: Injuries or health issues resulting from following training recommendations, whether generated by AI or coaches.
items.unauthorized: Unauthorized access to your account due to negligence in protecting your credentials.

liability.p2: Endurix's total cumulative liability for any claim related to the service shall not exceed the amount you have paid for the service during the 12 months preceding the event giving rise to the claim, or ARS 50,000 (or its equivalent in your local currency), whichever is greater.

indemnification.title: Indemnification
indemnification.text: You agree to indemnify and hold harmless Endurix, its officers, employees, and agents from any claims, damages, losses, liabilities, and expenses (including reasonable legal fees) arising from your use of the service, your breach of these terms, or your violation of third-party rights.

byUser.title: By the User
byUser.text: You can delete your account at any time from your profile settings. When you do so, we will stop processing your data and delete it in accordance with our Privacy Policy.

byUs.title: By Endurix
byUs.text: We reserve the right to suspend or terminate your account if you violate these terms, use the platform abusively, or if required for legal or security reasons. We will notify you at least 30 days in advance except in cases of serious violations.

effects.title: Effects of Termination
effects.text: Upon termination of your account, you will lose access to the platform and your stored data. You can request a copy of your data before deletion by contacting us at info@endurix.app.

law.title: Governing Law
law.text: These terms are governed by the laws of the Argentine Republic. Any dispute shall be submitted to the jurisdiction of the ordinary courts of the Autonomous City of Buenos Aires, waiving any other jurisdiction that may apply.

changes.title: Modifications
changes.text: We reserve the right to modify these terms at any time. Material changes will be notified by email or through a prominent notice on the platform at least 15 days in advance. Continued use of the service after the effective date of changes constitutes your acceptance of the modified terms.

severability.title: Severability
severability.text: If any provision of these terms is found to be invalid or unenforceable, the remaining provisions shall continue in full force and effect.

contact.title: Contact
contact.subtitle: For inquiries about these terms, contact us:

garmin.title: Garmin
garmin.description: Send your Endurix workouts directly to your Garmin calendar.
garmin.disclaimer: This is an unofficial integration. We use your Garmin credentials only once to sign in and store only the encrypted session tokens (never your password). You can disconnect at any time. The account must not have 2FA enabled (not supported).
garmin.consentText: I understand this is an unofficial integration and I authorize Endurix to connect to my Garmin account to send and read workouts.
garmin.cardDescription: Unofficial integration (pilot). Send your workouts to your Garmin calendar and sync your activities.
garmin.reauthWarning: The Garmin session has expired. Reconnect to continue sending workouts.
garmin.debugLoadError: Could not load Garmin debug info

generic.INTERNAL_SERVER_ERROR: Internal server error. Please try again later.
generic.RATE_LIMIT_EXCEEDED: Too many requests. Please wait a moment.

auth.UNAUTHORIZED: You are not signed in or your session has expired.
auth.FORBIDDEN: You do not have permission to perform this action.
auth.TEAM_REQUIRED: You must belong to a team to perform this action.
auth.COACH_ONLY: This action is only allowed for coaches.
auth.ADMIN_ONLY: This action is only allowed for administrators.
auth.COACH_OR_ADMIN_ONLY: This action is only allowed for coaches or administrators.
auth.NOT_OWNER: You do not have permission to view or modify other users' data.
auth.INVALID_OAUTH_STATE: Invalid authentication state. Please try again.
auth.COACH_TEAM_REQUIRED: As a coach, you must be assigned to a team.
auth.ADMIN_TEAM_REQUIRED: As an administrator, you must belong to a team.
auth.VIEW_ACTIVITY_FORBIDDEN: You do not have permission to view this activity.
auth.MODIFY_ACTIVITY_FORBIDDEN: You do not have permission to modify this activity.
auth.VIEW_ASSIGNMENT_FORBIDDEN: You do not have permission to view this assignment.
auth.UPDATE_ASSIGNMENT_FORBIDDEN: You do not have permission to update this assignment.
auth.DELETE_ASSIGNMENT_FORBIDDEN: You do not have permission to delete this assignment.

validation.INVALID_FORMAT: The format entered is not valid.
validation.OUT_OF_RANGE: The value is out of the allowed range.
validation.AT_LEAST_ONE_RECIPIENT_REQUIRED: You must select at least one athlete or group.
validation.PASSWORD_TOO_SHORT: Password must be at least 6 characters.
validation.INVALID_EMAIL: The email entered is not valid.

strava.NOT_CONNECTED: Your Strava account is not connected.
strava.NO_ZONES_FOUND: No heart rate zones found in your Strava profile.
strava.FAILED_TO_FETCH_ACTIVITY_FROM_STRAVA: Error fetching the activity from Strava.
strava.NO_HEART_RATE_ZONES_FOUND_IN_STRAVA_PROF: No heart rate zones found in Strava.

operations.ALREADY_MEMBER: The athlete is already a member of this group.
operations.NO_ATHLETES_FOUND: No athletes found to assign the training.
operations.RACE_ASSIGN_FAILED: Error assigning the race to the athlete.

notFound.subtitle: The route you followed no longer exists. Head back to the start line and pick up your plan from the dashboard.
notFound.tip: Tip: check the URL or use the main navigation to find what you're looking for.

errorPage.subtitle: We hit a technical stumble. The team has been notified. Try reloading or start over.
errorPage.label: Error detail
errorPage.helpText: If the problem persists, contact support with the identifier above.

globalError.subtitle: We detected a critical error. Reload the page or go to the home screen. The team has been notified.

plans.title: Plans
plans.subtitle: Build reusable mesocycles and assign whole blocks in seconds.

empty.title: No plans yet
empty.description: Create a multi-week plan from your workout templates and assign it to an athlete or group all at once.

apply.title: Apply "{name}"
apply.startDateHint: The plan starts on the Monday of the chosen week.
apply.selectAtLeastOne: Select at least one athlete or group
